When this creature enters, a random opponent gains control of it, and it kidnaps: exile a creature you control chosen at random until this creature leaves the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text: The shore was distant, the wind cruel, and the song crueler still.

cards.name: The Hound
cards.rules_text:
As this creature enters, choose its companion form —
• Boar — It gets +1/+1 and has "When this creature dies, it deals 3 damage to any target."
• Crow — It has flying and "At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 1."
• Hound — It has vigilance and gets +2/+2 as long as it's blocking.
• Monkey — It has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token."
• Serpent — It has deathtouch and menace.
Loyal — Opponents can't gain control of this creature.
At the beginning of your end step, if this creature dealt damage this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
cards.flavor_text: Loyalty is not tamed. It is earned.

cards.name: The Legion
cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, create twenty 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.
Soldier tokens you control get +0/+1 and have vigilance.
cards.flavor_text: Twenty spears, one will.

cards.name: The Masque
cards.rules_text: Exile all creatures you control, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal that many creature cards or all cards in your library are revealed. Put the revealed creature cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
cards.flavor_text: When the masque was lifted, someone else was wearing his life.

cards.name: The Mercian Wolves
cards.rules_text:
An opponent chosen at random creates eight 2/2 black and green Wolf creature tokens with "This creature attacks the player who drew The Mercian Wolves each combat if able."
Those Wolves have menace as long as four or more Wolves are attacking.
cards.flavor_text: First you hear one howl. Then you count the rest.

cards.name: The Minotaur
cards.rules_text:
Menace
When this creature enters, mark you, then a random opponent gains control of it. Exile all other creatures you control until this creature leaves the battlefield.
This creature can block any number of creatures and can't attack players other than the marked player.
cards.flavor_text: The centre is not a place. It is a meeting.

cards.name: The Orchard
cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep and whenever a land you control enters, put a growth counter on this enchantment.
In Bloom — At the beginning of your upkeep, if this enchantment has seven or more growth counters, create two Food tokens and put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.
cards.flavor_text: Seven days from seed to shade — and forever after, no one in the valley hungered.

cards.name: The Pestilence
cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, you become plagued.
At the beginning of each plagued player's upkeep, they lose 2 life and put a -1/-1 counter on a creature they control.
Contagion — Whenever a creature with a -1/-1 counter on it that a plagued player controls deals combat damage to another player's creature or to another player, that player becomes plagued.
Whenever a spell a plagued player controls deals damage to a player, that player becomes plagued. If it deals damage to a creature, put a -1/-1 counter on that creature.
When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, all players stop being plagued.
cards.flavor_text: The first cough was a curiosity. The hundredth was a funeral bell.

cards.name: The Phantom
cards.rules_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
It can't leave the battlefield except by a card named The Fates.
When this creature enters, mark you, then a random opponent gains control of it.
It attacks the marked player each combat if able and can't block.
Dread — Creatures the marked player controls get -1/-0.
When the marked player loses or leaves the game, exile this creature.
cards.flavor_text: It did not hate him. It simply never stopped.

cards.name: The Returned
cards.rules_text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with two +1/+1 counters on it, then roll a d6 — it comes back changed. It gains the matching keyword counter: 1 — deathtouch, 2 — lifelink, 3 — menace, 4 — first strike, 5 — vigilance, 6 — flying.
cards.flavor_text: She came back, but as something more.

cards.name: The Satyr
cards.rules_text:
Vanishing 2
When this creature enters, each player creates two Food tokens and draws a card.
The Feast — Creatures can't attack, and players can't cast instant or sorcery spells.
cards.flavor_text: No one remembered arriving. No one wished to leave.

cards.name: The Scorpion
cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch, menace
Sting — When this creature enters, exile target creature or planeswalker. It can be targeted despite hexproof, shroud, protection, and ward, and the exile can't be prevented or replaced.
cards.flavor_text: No matter who. No matter where.

cards.name: The Asp
cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch
When this creature enters, it bites you. Whenever it deals damage to an opponent, it bites that player.
Whenever this creature bites a player, that player gets a venom counter and an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have a venom counter, you get another venom counter. Then if you have four or more venom counters, you lose the game."
Venom counters can't be removed, except by a card named The Fates.
cards.flavor_text: By the time you feel the bite, the matter is settled.

cards.name: The Shroud
cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, exile your hand and graveyard face down.
Each player has shroud. (Players can't be the targets of spells or abilities.)
When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, return each card exiled with it to the zone it came from.
cards.flavor_text: He knew how to fight. He could not say why he wept while doing it.

cards.name: The Siren
cards.rules_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, mark you, then a random opponent gains control of it.
At the beginning of the marked player's upkeep, they may discard a card to resist the song. If they don't, they get a charm counter.
Thrall — Whenever a charm counter is put on the marked player, if they have three or more, remove them all and this creature's controller controls the marked player during that player's next turn.
cards.flavor_text: The song asked for nothing. It only promised.

cards.name: The Spire
cards.rules_text:
Choose a card type. You get an emblem with "Spells of the chosen type you cast cost {1} less to cast" and "Whenever you cast your first spell of the chosen type each turn, scry 1."
Then draw a card from the Deck of Many Things. (This draw doesn't cost a Fate Point.)
cards.flavor_text: Mastery is a staircase with no top step.

cards.name: The Stag
cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, target creature an opponent controls becomes your quarry for as long as it remains on the battlefield. Your quarry can't have hexproof or shroud.
Creatures you control get +1/+0 as long as they're attacking or blocking the quarry or its controller.
When your quarry dies, you gain a level: draw two cards and put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Then sacrifice this enchantment.
cards.flavor_text: The hunt does not end at the kill. It ends at the becoming.

cards.name: The Tempest
cards.rules_text:
Each player sacrifices an artifact or enchantment of their choice.
Then roll 2d10. The Tempest deals that much damage to each player.
cards.flavor_text: The sky opened its hand and closed its fist.

cards.name: Titania
cards.rules_text: You may sacrifice the nonland permanent you control with the greatest mana value. If you do, look at the top three cards of the Deck of Many Things — cast one of them and put the rest back in a random order.
cards.flavor_text: "A fair price," said the queen, "is whatever it costs you most."

cards.name: The Weaver
cards.rules_text:
When this enchantment enters, choose target player and weave their final destiny — choose one:
• Ruin — That player gets an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, if your life total is 10 or less, you lose the game."
• Triumph — That player gets an emblem with "If you would lose the game, instead remove this emblem, your life total becomes 10, and you take an extra turn after this one."
• Revelation — That player takes two extra turns after this one. At the beginning of the end step of the second of those extra turns, that player loses the game.
cards.flavor_text: Every thread ends. She merely decides the knot.

cards.name: Phantasmal Red Dragon
cards.rules_text:
Flying, haste
Dragonfire — When this creature enters, it deals 4 damage divided as you choose among one, two, three, or four targets.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The heat is a memory. The terror is not.

cards.name: Phantasmal Archmage
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Spellweave — When this creature enters, copy target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Even her spells are quotations.

cards.name: Phantasmal Assassin
cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch, first strike, haste
When this creature enters, target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The wound disagrees.

cards.name: Phantasmal Bandit Captain
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Other attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Her crew never asks where the gold goes when she fades.

cards.name: Phantasmal Beholder
cards.rules_text:
Flying, haste
Eye Rays — When this creature enters, choose one —
• Each opponent sacrifices an enchantment of their choice.
• Creatures you control gain menace until your next turn.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Ten eyes, and every one of them a lie that can see you.

cards.name: Phantasmal Berserker
cards.rules_text:
Haste
This creature gets +2/+0 as long as it's attacking, and it attacks each combat if able.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: It screams with a borrowed voice and swings with borrowed rage.

cards.name: Phantasmal Bugbear
cards.rules_text:
First strike, menace, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The ambush is imaginary. Flinch anyway.

cards.name: Phantasmal Cloud Giant
cards.rules_text:
Reach, haste
Skyward Toss — When this creature enters, return up to one target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: It threw the wagon over the ridge. The wagon has yet to land.

cards.name: Phantasmal Druid
cards.rules_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The grove he tends grows real fruit. No one understands this.

cards.name: Phantasmal Erinyes
cards.rules_text:
Flying, deathtouch, haste
When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Hell keeps no records of her visits. Hell denies everything.

cards.name: Phantasmal Ettin
cards.rules_text:
Double strike, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Two heads. Neither of them real. Both of them angry.

cards.name: Phantasmal Fire Giant
cards.rules_text:
Menace, haste
Forgeflame — When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to any target.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Heat the forge never gave it.

cards.name: Phantasmal Frost Giant
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Glacial Grip — When this creature enters, tap up to two target creatures. They don't untap during their controllers' next untap steps.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The cold is honest. Nothing else about it is.

cards.name: Phantasmal Gnoll
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each other attacking creature.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: It laughs before it lunges. The pack it runs with isn't there.

cards.name: Phantasmal Goblin
cards.rules_text:
Haste
This creature can't be blocked.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Too quick to catch, too fake to matter, too annoying to ignore.

cards.name: Phantasmal Guardian Naga
cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch, haste
Warden's Rebuke — When this creature enters, counter up to one target activated or triggered ability.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Its treasure was spent centuries ago.

cards.name: Phantasmal Hill Giant
cards.rules_text:
Trample, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Big, slow, and made of nothing. The fence it broke was real.

cards.name: Phantasmal Hobgoblin
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Pack Tactics — This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control another creature.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: It holds the line because it doesn't know it can't.

cards.name: Phantasmal Incubus
cards.rules_text:
Flying, lifelink, haste
When this creature enters, tap target creature.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The dream stays even after you stop believing in the dreamer.

cards.name: Phantasmal Iron Golem
cards.rules_text:
Indestructible, haste
Poison Breath — When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to each opponent.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: No iron, no rust, no mercy.

cards.name: Phantasmal Knight
cards.rules_text:
First strike, vigilance, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Its oath outlived its order, its body, and now its existence.

cards.name: Phantasmal Kobold
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Pack Tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each other attacking creature you control.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Brave in numbers, and the numbers lie.

cards.name: Phantasmal Lich
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Dread Whisper — When this creature enters, choose one —
• Each opponent discards two cards.
• Return target card from your graveyard to your hand, then draw a card.
When this creature dies, each opponent loses 3 life.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Death remembers it. That is almost the same as being.

cards.name: Phantasmal Medusa
cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch, haste
Petrifying Gaze — When this creature enters, destroy target tapped creature.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Stone never asks if the gaze was real.

cards.name: Phantasmal Night Hag
cards.rules_text:
Flying, haste
Nightmare Haunting — When this creature enters, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Disbelief has never kept her out.

cards.name: Phantasmal Ogre
cards.rules_text:
Trample, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The club whistles. The wind is real; the arm is not.

cards.name: Phantasmal Oni
cards.rules_text:
Flying, hexproof, haste (An oni hides inside its own illusion.)
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: You cannot dispel what you cannot find.

cards.name: Phantasmal Priest
cards.rules_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The blessing lands. Whom it came from is a longer question.

cards.name: Phantasmal Succubus
cards.rules_text:
Flying, lifelink, haste
Charm — When this creature enters, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Love at first sight, and none at second.

cards.name: Phantasmal Troll
cards.rules_text:
Haste
Knit — Once each turn, if this creature would be sacrificed or destroyed, instead tap it and remove all damage from it.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: Cut it all you like. It remembers being whole.

cards.name: Phantasmal Veteran
cards.rules_text:
First strike, haste
Drill — Whenever this creature attacks, another target attacking creature gains first strike until end of turn.
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: It teaches a stance it learned in a war that never happened.

cards.name: Phantasmal Wyvern
cards.rules_text:
Flying, deathtouch, haste
Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it.
cards.flavor_text: The sting is a rumor your blood chooses to believe.

cards.name: Phantasmal Self
cards.rules_text:
You may have this creature enter as a copy of a creature you control, except it's an Illusion in addition to its other types, and it has haste and "Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it."
The "legend rule" doesn't apply to this creature.
cards.flavor_text: The deck's mirror holds you.

cards.name: Phantasmal Reflection
cards.rules_text:
You may have this creature enter as a copy of a creature an opponent controls, except it's an Illusion in addition to its other types, and it has haste and "Figment — When this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it."
The "legend rule" doesn't apply to this creature.
cards.flavor_text: It walks like you. It fights like you. It was never you.

cards.name: The Artifact
cards.rules_text:
When this artifact enters, search your library for a card, reveal it, and put it into your hand.
At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card.
Whenever a player deals combat damage to the player who controls this artifact, that player gains control of this artifact.
cards.flavor_text: Tome, symbol, sword — the reading names what must be found.

cards.name: The Beast of Barovia
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, roll a d20. If you roll 10 or higher, it gains vigilance and ward {2}. Otherwise, it gets +2/+2 and gains trample, haste, and "This creature attacks each combat if able."
cards.flavor_text: It walked into camp on two legs. Moonrise is not impressed by legs.

cards.name: The Broken One
cards.rules_text:
Flying
If this creature would die, instead return it to the battlefield tapped with two -1/-1 counters on it. If its toughness is 0 or less, exile it instead.
cards.flavor_text: Each defeat returns a little less of him.

cards.name: The Darklord
cards.rules_text:
Flying, lifelink
When this creature enters, each other creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Whenever another creature dies this turn, create a Blood token. (Blood tokens are artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a Blood token or this creature deals 3 damage to you.
cards.flavor_text: The land is his. The night is his. The reading was his idea.

cards.name: The Gaol
cards.rules_text: When this enchantment enters, for each opponent, exile up to one creature that player controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text: Its walls are patient.

cards.name: The Executioner
cards.rules_text: {T}: Destroy target creature an opponent controls. If that creature was neither attacking nor blocking this turn, its controller draws two cards.
cards.flavor_text: The verdict was written before the trial.

cards.name: The Ghost
cards.rules_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
• Exile target creature card from an opponent's graveyard. Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.
cards.flavor_text: The past does not haunt Barovia. It governs.

cards.name: The Horseman
cards.rules_text:
Menace, haste
When this creature enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice with the greatest power among creatures they control.
cards.flavor_text: The bloodline ends where the hoofprints do.

cards.name: The Innocent
cards.flavor_text: Some lights the mists gather close, and dim slowly.

cards.name: The Marionette
cards.rules_text:
Whenever this Vehicle becomes crewed, you may have it become a copy of target creature that crewed it until end of turn, except it's a Vehicle artifact in addition to its other types and it has haste.
Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)
cards.flavor_text: The strings run upward into the dark.

cards.name: The Mists
cards.rules_text:
Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each attacking creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 1.
cards.flavor_text: Barovia has no borders. Only depths.

cards.name: The Raven
cards.rules_text:
Flying, vigilance
When this creature enters or deals combat damage to a player, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
cards.flavor_text: Not every shadow in Barovia serves the devil.

cards.name: The Seer
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, scry 3, then draw a card.
Once each turn, if you would roll a die, you may choose the result instead.
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may play the top card of your library.
cards.flavor_text: She does not predict fate. She reads it aloud.

cards.name: The Tempter
cards.rules_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, for each opponent, that player chooses one — you draw a card; or that player loses 3 life and you create a Blood token.
cards.flavor_text: Every bargain in Barovia is signed twice.

cards.name: The Avenger
cards.rules_text:
First strike
Retribution — Once each turn, when a source an opponent controls deals damage to you or a permanent you control, this creature deals 2 damage to that source or that source's controller.
cards.flavor_text: Justice in Barovia carries a whetstone.

cards.name: The Templar
cards.rules_text:
Lifelink
Other creatures you control get +0/+1.
When this creature enters, you gain 2 life for each creature you control.
cards.flavor_text: His oath outlived his order.

cards.name: The Soldier
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.
cards.flavor_text: War asks. Barovia answers.

cards.name: The Mercenary
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")
Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: Loyal to the coin, and the coin is loyal to no one.

cards.name: The Myrmidon
cards.rules_text: Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +2/+2 and gains double strike until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: One against the column. The column lost.

cards.name: The Berserker
cards.rules_text:
Haste, trample
This creature attacks each combat if able.
cards.flavor_text: The wolf under the skin does not sleep.

cards.name: The Hooded One
cards.rules_text:
Menace
When this creature enters, target creature can't block this turn.
cards.flavor_text: No one asked what the newcomer left behind.

cards.name: The Dictator
cards.rules_text: At the beginning of combat on each player's turn, you may goad target creature that player controls. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)
cards.flavor_text: Fear is the only law that enforces itself.

cards.name: The Torturer
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
cards.flavor_text: He keeps a ledger of screams.

cards.name: The Master of Swords
cards.rules_text:
Double strike, haste, menace
Whenever this creature attacks, other creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: Strength is the only sermon he ever preached.

cards.name: The Swashbuckler
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")
Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: Gold spends faster in good company.

cards.name: The Philanthropist
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, each player creates a Treasure token. You gain 2 life for each Treasure token created this way.
cards.flavor_text: His coin fights the devil in a hundred small hands.

cards.name: The Trader
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, create a Treasure token, then draw a card and discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: Everything crosses the border eventually — for a price.

cards.name: The Merchant
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: Rare goods, rarer honesty.

cards.name: The Guild Member
cards.rules_text: As long as you control three or more artifacts, this creature gets +2/+2 and has menace.
cards.flavor_text: The guild's pride is stitched into every seam.

cards.name: The Beggar
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, roll a d20. If you roll 10 or higher, create three Treasure tokens. Otherwise, discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: Yesterday a lord. Tomorrow — ask the cards.

cards.name: The Thief
cards.rules_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library face down. You may look at and play that card for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast it.
cards.flavor_text: The tome was gone before the alarm was rung.

cards.name: The Tax Collector
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life unless they sacrifice an artifact or discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: The count's share, collected in the count's name.

cards.name: The Miser
cards.rules_text:
This creature gets +1/+1 for each Treasure you control.
At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't sacrifice an artifact this turn, create a Treasure token.
cards.flavor_text: He counts them nightly. They count him back.

cards.name: The Master of Coins
cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your end step, create a Treasure token.
Whenever an artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: In Barovia even the coffin has a toll.

cards.name: The Transmuter
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.
cards.flavor_text: Lead remembers being gold, if pressed.

cards.name: The Diviner
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, investigate twice. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
cards.flavor_text: The stars do not lie. They abbreviate.

cards.name: The Enchanter
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, tap up to two target creatures. They don't untap during their controllers' next untap steps.
cards.flavor_text: Doubt, once planted, waters itself.

cards.name: The Abjurer
cards.rules_text:
Ward {1}
When this creature enters, investigate.
cards.flavor_text: The overlooked clue is the one that saves you.

cards.name: The Elementalist
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, create a 3/1 red Elemental creature token with haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
cards.flavor_text: Harvest and disaster are the same spell, aimed.

cards.name: The Evoker
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, roll a d20. This creature deals damage equal to half the result, rounded up, to any target.
cards.flavor_text: The spell knew no restraint. Neither did she.

cards.name: The Illusionist
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.
When this creature dies, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: The saboteur you caught was never there.

cards.name: The Necromancer
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from a graveyard to the battlefield tapped under your control.
cards.flavor_text: Barovia's soil gives everything back wrong.

cards.name: The Conjurer
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, create four 1/1 blue Illusion creature tokens with flying.
cards.flavor_text: They think themselves gods. The mists let them.

cards.name: The Master of Stars
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
cards.flavor_text: Power is a riddle; he collects the answers.

cards.name: The Monk
cards.rules_text:
Vigilance, ward {2}
When this creature enters, you gain hexproof until your next turn.
cards.flavor_text: Stillness, even here, is a fortress.

cards.name: The Missionary
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
Other creatures you control get +1/+1.
cards.flavor_text: Faith travels farthest on frightened roads.

cards.name: The Healer
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• You gain 4 life.
• Distribute two -1/-1 counters among one or two target creatures.
cards.flavor_text: Her hands close wounds. Her shadow opens them.

cards.name: The Shepherd
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. If this creature is the target, you gain 4 life.
cards.flavor_text: He carries what the flock cannot.

cards.name: The Druid
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. You gain 2 life.
cards.flavor_text: Nature in Barovia is red in root and thorn.

cards.name: The Anarchist
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment.
cards.flavor_text: Every church he burned, he built first.

cards.name: The Charlatan
cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, target opponent chooses one —
• You draw two cards.
• Each opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor_text: Both of his faiths are for sale.

cards.name: The Bishop
cards.rules_text:
Creatures your opponents control enter tapped.
When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.
cards.flavor_text: The code is strict. The exceptions are his.

cards.name: The Traitor
cards.rules_text: When this creature enters, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: The knife came from inside the chapel.

cards.name: The Master of Glyphs
cards.rules_text:
Lifelink
Once each turn, when you gain life, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.
cards.flavor_text: Enlightenment, he says, is mostly endurance.
